Step 10: ((🪻 ⊗ 🪻) ⊗ 🧶) = (🪩 ⊗ 🧶)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 11: (🪩 ⊗ 🧶) = 🪬    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🪬

Step 6: (🪵 ⊛ (inv(🪨) ⊗ 🪬)) = (🪵 ⊛ (🪵 ⊗ 🪬))    [by inv]
Step 7: (🪵 ⊛ (🪵 ⊗ 🪬)) = (🪵 ⊛ 🪨)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 8: (🪵 ⊛ 🪨) = inv(🪵 ⊗ 🪨)    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 9: inv(🪵 ⊗ 🪨) = inv(🪵)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 10: inv(🪵) = 🪺    [by inv]

Final Output: 🪺

Step 6: (🧄 ⊛ inv((🧊 ⊗ 🪨))) = (🧄 ⊛ inv(🧁))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 7: (🧄 ⊛ inv(🧁)) = (🧄 ⊛ 🧄)    [by inv]
Step 8: (🧄 ⊛ 🧄) = inv(🧄 ⊕ 🧄)    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 9: inv(🧄 ⊕ 🧄) = inv(🧊)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 10: inv(🧊) = 🪨    [by inv]

Final Output: 🪨

Step 6: (🪩 ⊗ (🪣 ⊛ inv(🪼))) = (🪩 ⊗ (🪣 ⊛ 🫧))    [by inv transformation]
Step 7: (🪩 ⊗ (🪣 ⊛ 🫧)) = (🪩 ⊗ inv(🪣 ⊗ 🫧))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 8: (🪩 ⊗ inv(🪣 ⊗ 🫧)) = (🪩 ⊗ inv(🪼))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 9: (🪩 ⊗ inv(🪼)) = (🪩 ⊗ 🫧)    [by inv transformation]
Step 10: (🪩 ⊗ 🫧) = 🪼    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🪼

Step 6: (🐌 ⊛ (🪸 ⊛ 🐌)) = (🐌 ⊛ ((🪸 ⊗ 🪸) ⊗ 🐌))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 7: (🐌 ⊛ ((🪸 ⊗ 🪸) ⊗ 🐌)) = (🐌 ⊛ (🦎 ⊗ 🐌))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 8: (🐌 ⊛ (🦎 ⊗ 🐌)) = (🐌 ⊗ 🐌) ⊗ (🦎 ⊗ 🐌)    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 9: (🐌 ⊗ 🐌) ⊗ (🦎 ⊗ 🐌) = 🪵 ⊗ 🦎    [by ⊗ table]
Step 10: 🪵 ⊗ 🦎 = 🪵    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🪵

Step 5: (🦔 ⊛ (🥟 ⊕ (🪣 ⊕ 🪣))) = (🦔 ⊛ (🥟 ⊕ 🪵))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 6: (🦔 ⊛ (🥟 ⊕ 🪵)) = (🦔 ⊛ 🦔)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: (🦔 ⊛ 🦔) = ((🦔 ⊗ 🦔) ⊗ 🦔)    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 8: ((🦔 ⊗ 🦔) ⊗ 🦔) = (🦔 ⊗ 🦔)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 9: (🦔 ⊗ 🦔) = 🦔    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🦔

Step 6: (🧶 ⊛ (🧶 ⊗ inv(🫐))) = (🧶 ⊛ (🧶 ⊗ 🪈))    [by inv]
Step 7: (🧶 ⊛ (🧶 ⊗ 🪈)) = (🧶 ⊛ 🪈)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 8: (🧶 ⊛ 🪈) = inv(🧶 ⊗ 🪈)    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 9: inv(🧶 ⊗ 🪈) = inv(🪈)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 10: inv(🪈) = 🧶    [by inv]

Final Output: 🧶

Step 8: (🧿 ⊗ ((🧄 ⊗ 🧿) ⊞ ((🫑 ⊗ 🫑) ⊕ (🫑 ⊗ 🪺)))) = (🧿 ⊗ ((🫑) ⊞ ((🫑 ⊗ 🫑) ⊕ (🫑 ⊗ 🪺))))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 9: (🧿 ⊗ (🫑 ⊞ ((🪺) ⊕ (🫑))))    [by ⊗ table twice]
Step 10: (🧿 ⊗ (🫑 ⊞ (🪺)))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 11: (🧿 ⊗ inv(🫑 ⊕ 🪺))    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 12: (🧿 ⊗ inv(🧄))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 13: (🧿 ⊗ 🪭)    [by inv]
Step 14: (🪭)    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🪭

Step 9: inv((🪻 ⊛ (🐌 ⊕ (🪼 ⊞ 🐌)))) = inv((🪻 ⊛ (🐌 ⊕ ((🪼 ⊕ 🪼) ⊕ 🐌))))    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 10: inv((🪻 ⊛ (🐌 ⊕ ((🪼 ⊕ 🪼) ⊕ 🐌)))) = inv((🪻 ⊛ (🐌 ⊕ (🪻 ⊕ 🐌))))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 11: inv((🪻 ⊛ (🐌 ⊕ (🪻 ⊕ 🐌)))) = inv((🪻 ⊛ (🐌 ⊕ 🪼)))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 12: inv((🪻 ⊛ (🐌 ⊕ 🪼))) = inv(((🪻 ⊗ (🐌 ⊕ 🪼)) ⊗ 🪻))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 13: inv(((🪻 ⊗ (🐌 ⊕ 🪼)) ⊗ 🪻)) = inv(((🪻 ⊗ 🪼) ⊗ 🪻))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 14: inv(((🪻 ⊗ 🪼) ⊗ 🪻)) = inv((🪼 ⊗ 🪻))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 15: inv((🪼 ⊗ 🪻)) = inv(🪼)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 16: inv(🪼) = 🪻    [by inv]

Final Output: 🪻

Step 8: inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ (🫐 ⊞ 🪵)))) = inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ (🫐 ⊗ 🫐) ⊗ 🪵)))    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 9: inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ (🫐 ⊗ 🪵)))) = inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ 🧿)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 10: inv(rot((🪭 ⊗ 🪭) ⊗ 🧿)) = inv(rot(🫐 ⊗ 🧿))    [by definition of ⊞ and ⊗ table]
Step 11: inv(rot(🪵)) = inv(🪭)    [by ⊗ table and rot]
Step 12: inv(🪭) = 🫐    [by inv]

Final Output: 🫐

Step 8: (inv(🧶) ⊗ rot(((🧿 ⊛ 🦎) ⊕ inv(🦎)))) = (🦎 ⊗ rot(((🧿 ⊛ 🦎) ⊕ inv(🦎))))    [by inv]
Step 9: (🦎 ⊗ rot(((🧿 ⊛ 🦎) ⊕ inv(🦎)))) = (🦎 ⊗ rot(((🧿 ⊕ 🧿) ⊕ inv(🦎))))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 10: (🦎 ⊗ rot(((🧿 ⊕ 🧿) ⊕ inv(🦎)))) = (🦎 ⊗ rot((🧿 ⊕ inv(🦎))))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 11: (🦎 ⊗ rot((🧿 ⊕ inv(🦎)))) = (🦎 ⊗ rot((🧿 ⊕ 🪻)))    [by inv]
Step 12: (🦎 ⊗ rot((🧿 ⊕ 🪻))) = (🦎 ⊗ (rot(🧿) ⊕ rot(🪻)))    [by distribution of rot over ⊕]
Step 13: (🦎 ⊗ (rot(🧿) ⊕ rot(🪻))) = (🦎 ⊗ (🧿 ⊕ 🪈))    [by rot]
Step 14: (🦎 ⊗ (🧿 ⊕ 🪈)) = (🦎 ⊗ 🧶)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 15: (🦎 ⊗ 🧶) = 🧶    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🧶

Step 9: ((🥟 ⊕ (🥟 ⊞ rot(🪵))) ⊞ 🫐) = ((🥟 ⊕ (🥟 ⊞ 🫐)) ⊞ 🫐)    [by rot]
Step 10: ((🥟 ⊕ (🥟 ⊞ 🫐)) ⊞ 🫐) = ((🥟 ⊕ inv(🥟 ⊕ 🫐)) ⊞ 🫐)    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 11: ((🥟 ⊕ inv(🥟 ⊕ 🫐)) ⊞ 🫐) = ((🥟 ⊕ inv(🪵)) ⊞ 🫐)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 12: ((🥟 ⊕ inv(🪵)) ⊞ 🫐) = ((🥟 ⊕ 🪸) ⊞ 🫐)    [by inv]
Step 13: ((🥟 ⊕ 🪸) ⊞ 🫐) = (🫐 ⊞ 🫐)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 14: (🫐 ⊞ 🫐) = inv(🫐 ⊕ 🫐)    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 15: inv(🫐 ⊕ 🫐) = inv(🪬)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 16: inv(🪬) = 🥟    [by inv]

Final Output: 🥟

Step 5: (🧁 ⊗ (🐙 ⊛ (🧁 ⊕ 🧁))) = (🧁 ⊗ (🐙 ⊛ 🫧))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 6: (🧁 ⊗ (🐙 ⊛ 🫧)) = (🧁 ⊗ inv(🐙 ⊕ 🫧))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 7: (🧁 ⊗ inv(🐙 ⊕ 🫧)) = (🧁 ⊗ inv(🧁))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: (🧁 ⊗ inv(🧁)) = (🧁 ⊗ 🐙)    [by inv]
Step 9: (🧁 ⊗ 🐙) = 🐙    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🐙

Step 9: (🪤 ⊛ (inv((🪨 ⊛ 🐌)) ⊗ 🪭)) = (🪤 ⊛ (inv(inv(🪨 ⊕ 🐌)) ⊗ 🪭))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 10: (🪤 ⊛ (inv(inv(🪨 ⊕ 🐌)) ⊗ 🪭)) = (🪤 ⊛ ((🪨 ⊕ 🐌) ⊗ 🪭))    [by inv(inv(x)) = x]
Step 11: (🪤 ⊛ ((🪨 ⊕ 🐌) ⊗ 🪭)) = (🪤 ⊛ (🫑 ⊗ 🪭))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 12: (🪤 ⊛ (🫑 ⊗ 🪭)) = (🪤 ⊛ 🪭)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 13: (🪤 ⊛ 🪭) = inv(🪤 ⊕ 🪭)    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 14: inv(🪤 ⊕ 🪭) = inv(🐌)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 15: inv(🐌) = 🪤    [by inv]

Final Output: 🪤

Step 9: (🪵 ⊞ rot((🪭 ⊛ rot(🧁)))) = (🪵 ⊞ rot(((🪭 ⊗ 🪭) ⊗ rot(🧁))))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 10: (🪵 ⊞ rot(((🪭 ⊗ 🪭) ⊗ rot(🧁)))) = (🪵 ⊞ rot((🧁 ⊗ rot(🧁))))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 11: (🪵 ⊞ rot((🧁 ⊗ rot(🧁)))) = (🪵 ⊞ rot((🧁 ⊗ 🐙)))    [by rot]
Step 12: (🪵 ⊞ rot((🧁 ⊗ 🐙))) = (🪵 ⊞ rot(🥟))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 13: (🪵 ⊞ rot(🥟)) = (🪵 ⊞ 🪭)    [by rot]
Step 14: (🪵 ⊞ 🪭) = inv(🪵 ⊕ 🪭)    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 15: inv(🪵 ⊕ 🪭) = inv(🧁)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 16: inv(🧁) = 🥟    [by inv]

Final Output: 🥟

Step 8: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(rot((🐌 ⊗ 🧊)))))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(rot(🐌)))))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 9: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(rot(🐌))))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(🪸))))    [by definition of rot]
Step 10: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(🪸)))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ 🫑)))    [by definition of rot]
Step 11: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ 🫑))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot(((🫑 ⊕ 🫑) ⊕ 🫑)))    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 12: (🪆 ⊗ rot(((🫑 ⊕ 🫑) ⊕ 🫑))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot((🪤 ⊕ 🫑)))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 13: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🪤 ⊕ 🫑))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot(🪤))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 14: (🪆 ⊗ rot(🪤)) = (🪆 ⊗ 🧊)    [by definition of rot]
Step 15: (🪆 ⊗ 🧊) = 🪸    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🪸

Step 9: rot((🪆 ⊗ (((🪣 ⊗ 🪸) ⊛ inv(🪸)) ⊕ 🪈))) = rot((🪆 ⊗ (((🪣 ⊗ 🪸) ⊗ (inv(🪸) ⊗ inv(🪸))) ⊕ 🪈)))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 10: rot((🪆 ⊗ (((🪣 ⊗ 🪸) ⊗ (🪈 ⊗ 🪈)) ⊕ 🪈))) = rot((🪆 ⊗ ((🪣 ⊗ 🪸) ⊗ 🪆) ⊕ 🪈)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 11: rot((🪆 ⊗ ((🪣 ⊗ 🪸) ⊗ 🪆) ⊕ 🪈)) = rot((🪆 ⊗ (🪣 ⊗ 🪆) ⊕ 🪈))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 12: rot((🪆 ⊗ (🪣 ⊗ 🪆) ⊕ 🪈)) = rot((🪆 ⊗ 🪣 ⊕ 🪈))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 13: rot((🪆 ⊗ 🪣 ⊕ 🪈)) = rot((🪣 ⊕ 🪈))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 14: rot((🪣 ⊕ 🪈)) = rot(🪨)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 15: rot(🪨) = 🪸    [by definition of rot]

Final Output: 🪸

Step 9: (rot((🥟 ⊕ 🪬)) ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭)))) = (rot(🥟) ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭))))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 10: (rot(🥟) ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭)))) = (🪭 ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭))))    [by rot]
Step 11: (🪭 ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭)))) = (🪭 ⊞ inv(rot(🪬)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 12: (🪭 ⊞ inv(rot(🪬))) = (🪭 ⊞ inv(🧲))    [by rot]
Step 13: (🪭 ⊞ inv(🧲)) = (🪭 ⊞ 🪭)    [by inv]
Step 14: (🪭 ⊞ 🪭) = ((🪭 ⊕ 🪭) ⊕ 🪭)    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 15: ((🪭 ⊕ 🪭) ⊕ 🪭) = (🪈 ⊕ 🪭)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 16: (🪈 ⊕ 🪭) = 🧊    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🧊
